title: scrophularia aquatica subsp. ehrhartii
intro: Scrophularia aquatica subsp. ehrhartii, also known as water figwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scrophularia aquatica subsp. ehrhartii are believed to include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Scrophularia aquatica subsp. ehrhartii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
